chain.thought: Explanation: The last elimination occurred in episode 10, where two contestants were eliminated. The second (and thus last) elimination in that episode was Melisa Popanicić, making her the final participant eliminated while still competing.

judge_thought: Explanation: The latest elimination occurred in episode 10, where two participants were eliminated. Row 14 shows Melisa Popanicić as the "2nd eliminated in episode 10," making her the last participant to be eliminated while still competing (as opposed to quitting or finishing as runner-up/winner).
